H1.name: Stability strength > 0.50
H1.details: All sectors exceed 0.50 at all depths except neutral at depth 20 (0.4967)

H2.name: Boundary coherence > 0.70
H2.details: Projection and antisymmetry maintain > 0.70 through depth 12; neutral degrades after depth 5

H3.name: Degradation drift < 0.30
H3.details: All sectors remain below 0.30 threshold until depth 20 where neutral exceeds at 0.3124

H4.name: RG stability > 0.90
H4.details: RG similarity never exceeds 0.92; peaks at depth 1 projection (0.9156); falls below 0.80 at depth 20 neutral

H5.name: All sectors nonzero recursive retention
H5.details: All sectors maintain nonzero stability across all depths
